title: malaxis pumilio
intro: Malaxis pumilio, also known as the small adder's mouth orchid or adder's mouth orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Malaxis pumilio include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to create infusions or tinctures that can be applied topically or ingested to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
